technology.title: A startup claims it broke through a bottleneck that’s holding back LLMs
technology.summary: Miami-based AI startup Subquadratic came out of stealth mode last month with a huge claim. It announced that it had solved a mathematical bottleneck that had been holding back large language models for almost a decade. The details were thin, and many people were unconvinced. But Subquadratic has started to bring the receipts, sharing the…

briefing.news_focus: Miami-based AI startup Subquadratic came out of stealth mode last month with a huge claim. It announced that it had solved a mathematical bottleneck that had been holding back large language models for almost a decade. The details were thin, and many people were unconvinced. But Subquadratic has started to bring the receipts, sharing the…
briefing.news_focus_zh: 邁阿密的人工智慧初創公司Subquadratic上個月宣布突破了一個困擾大型語言模型（LLM）近十年的數學瓶頸。儘管該公司提供的細節有限，許多人對其聲明表示懷疑，但Subquadratic已開始提供證據以支持其主張。
briefing.background: 大型語言模型在過去幾年內取得了顯著的進展，但仍面臨著計算效率和數據處理能力的挑戰。這些瓶頸限制了模型的擴展性和實際應用的潛力。Subquadratic的突破若能被證實，可能會改變目前的技術格局，並促進更高效的模型開發。隨著AI技術的快速發展，市場對於能夠提升LLM性能的創新解決方案的需求日益增加，這使得該公司的聲明引起了廣泛關注。
briefing.analysis: Subquadratic的聲明可能會引發業界的廣泛討論，尤其是在大型語言模型的開發者和研究者之間。若其突破被證實，將有助於提升LLM的運算效率，並可能引領新一波的AI技術創新。然而，業界對於這一聲明的懷疑也反映了對於技術宣稱的謹慎態度，特別是在缺乏具體數據和詳細解釋的情況下。各方可能會密切觀察Subquadratic的後續行動，以評估其技術的真實性和潛在影響。

technology.title: Should the US impose a teen social media ban like the UK?
technology.summary: The UK is enforcing a social media ban for children under the age of 16. The BBC asked Americans of different ages if they thought it was a good idea.

briefing.news_focus: The UK is enforcing a social media ban for children under the age of 16. The BBC asked Americans of different ages if they thought it was a good idea.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國正在實施針對16歲以下兒童的社交媒體禁令，BBC詢問了不同年齡的美國人對此政策的看法。此舉引發了對美國是否應該採取類似措施的討論。
briefing.background: 英國的社交媒體禁令旨在保護青少年免受潛在的心理健康影響，特別是在社交媒體上遭遇的負面經驗。根據報導，這項禁令將於2027年生效，涉及的應用程序包括TikTok和Snapchat。與此同時，Pinterest的首席執行官比爾·瑞迪也呼籲全球領導者制定類似的禁令，並強調需要對青少年社交媒體使用進行更嚴格的監管。
briefing.analysis: 在美國，對於是否應該實施類似的社交媒體禁令存在不同的意見。一方面，支持者認為這樣的措施可以有效減少青少年面臨的心理健康問題和網絡欺凌風險。另一方面，反對者則擔心這可能會限制青少年的自由表達和社交能力。參考報導中提到的比爾·瑞迪的觀點強調了全球一致性的重要性，這可能會促使其他國家考慮類似的政策。隨著社交媒體對青少年影響的關注增加，未來可能會出現更多國家跟隨英國的步伐，進一步引發國際間的討論與政策調整。

supporting_titles: Pinterest CEO calls for ban on social media for youth under 16
When will social media ban start, and which apps will be affected?
supporting_summaries: Bill Ready pointed to Australia’s social media ban for under-16s as a model, though it does not apply to his company Pinterest’s CEO called on world leaders to ban social media for youth under 16 in a LinkedIn post on Friday. “We need a clear standard: no social media for teens under 16, backed by real enforcement, and accountability for mobile phone operating systems and the apps that run on them,” Bill Ready wrote. Pinterest, an image-sharing platform, has seen a surge in young users over the past year but has disappointed Wall Street with its quarterly financial reports of late. Continue reading...
The measures will see apps including TikTok and Snapchat banned for UK teens early in 2027.

technology.title: The US says ASML’s top chip tool may be in China. ASML says it isn’t
technology.summary: There's a commercial logic that cuts against the idea that ASML would risk its export license to arm a Chinese customer.

briefing.news_focus: There's a commercial logic that cuts against the idea that ASML would risk its export license to arm a Chinese customer.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國表示ASML的頂級晶片製造工具可能在中國，而ASML則否認此說法，強調不會冒險違反出口許可。這一爭議涉及到美國對中國科技產業的監管及ASML的商業考量。
briefing.background: ASML是全球領先的半導體設備製造商，其極紫外光（EUV）光刻機對於先進晶片的生產至關重要。隨著美國對中國科技企業的制裁加強，特別是在高科技領域，ASML的出口許可受到嚴格監控。美國擔心中國在半導體技術上的進步可能威脅到其國家安全，因此對ASML的監管也隨之加強。ASML在此背景下，必須在商業利益與遵守國際規範之間找到平衡。
briefing.analysis: 美國對ASML的指控反映出其對中國科技崛起的擔憂，尤其是在半導體領域的競爭。ASML的否認則強調了其商業邏輯，表明其不會冒險違反出口規定以服務中國客戶。這一事件可能會進一步加劇美中之間的科技競爭，並促使其他半導體設備製造商重新評估其市場策略。若ASML能夠持續保持其在全球市場的領導地位，將有助於其在面對美國監管壓力時的談判能力。此外，這一事件也可能影響到其他國家對中國的科技出口政策，特別是在半導體產業中。

politics.title: G7 rare earths, US-Iran peace deal, Summer Davos
politics.summary: The Group of Seven nations this week agreed to pare their reliance on China for vital raw materials, while European leaders struggled to reach a consensus on how to respond to a flood of low-cost Chinese imports. No single country should supply more than 60 per cent of the G7 nations’ rare earths and permanent magnets by 2030, their leaders agreed during a summit in Evian, France. The nations will subsequently aim for a 50 per cent limit as quickly as possible. Targets for other critical...

briefing.news_focus: The Group of Seven nations this week agreed to pare their reliance on China for vital raw materials, while European leaders struggled to reach a consensus on how to respond to a flood of low-cost Chinese imports. No single country should supply more than 60 per cent of the G7 nations’ rare earths and permanent magnets by 2030, their leaders agreed during a summit in Evian, France. The nations will subsequently aim for a 50 per cent limit as quickly as possible. Targets for other critical...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 七大工業國（G7）在法國埃維昂舉行的峰會上達成共識，計劃到2030年將對中國的稀土和永久磁鐵的依賴降低至不超過60%。此外，領導人還希望儘快將這一比例降低至50%。此舉旨在減少對中國的依賴，並應對來自中國的低成本進口的挑戰。
briefing.background: 在全球供應鏈中，稀土元素對於高科技產品的生產至關重要，尤其是在電動車、風能和電子產品等領域。中國目前是全球最大的稀土生產國，對於G7國家來說，過度依賴中國的供應鏈可能會帶來風險。隨著地緣政治緊張局勢的加劇，尤其是美中之間的貿易摩擦，G7國家意識到必須尋求多元化的供應來源，以確保自身的經濟安全和技術自主性。
briefing.analysis: G7國家此次達成的共識反映了對中國在稀土市場主導地位的擔憂，並顯示出各國在經濟安全上的共同利益。然而，如何有效執行這一目標仍然是一大挑戰，特別是在各國內部對於如何應對中國低價產品的看法不一。參考報導提到的以色列對黎巴嫩的攻擊，雖然與G7的稀土政策無直接關聯，但顯示出中東地區的緊張局勢可能會影響全球市場的穩定性，進而影響G7國家的經濟策略。因此，G7的政策不僅需要考慮中國的影響，還必須評估其他地區的地緣政治風險。

supporting_titles: Can US-Iran peace ‘deal’ survive Israeli bombing of Lebanon?
supporting_summaries: Israel is blowing up buildings in Lebanon - and chances of a lasting deal to secure peace in the region.

politics.title: Lebanon says Israeli strikes kill 18 as Israel says four soldiers killed by Hezbollah
politics.summary: It comes a day after the US and Iran signed a deal to end their conflict, including fighting in Lebanon.

briefing.news_focus: It comes a day after the US and Iran signed a deal to end their conflict, including fighting in Lebanon.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 黎巴嫩表示，最近的以色列空襲造成18人死亡，而以色列則報告其四名士兵在與真主黨的衝突中喪生。這一事件發生在美國與伊朗簽署協議以結束衝突的前一天，該協議包括停止在黎巴嫩的戰鬥。
briefing.background: 此次衝突發生在美國與伊朗達成協議的背景下，該協議旨在結束中東地區的戰爭，包括黎巴嫩的戰鬥。以色列的空襲主要針對真主黨的目標，這是一個受到伊朗支持的武裝組織，長期以來與以色列處於敵對狀態。黎巴嫩南部地區的緊張局勢由於真主黨與以色列的衝突而加劇，這使得當地民眾的安全局勢更加不穩定。
briefing.analysis: 以色列的空襲和隨後的士兵死亡事件顯示出在美國與伊朗達成協議後，地區局勢依然緊張。以色列的行動可能是對真主黨的威脅作出的反應，顯示出以色列對其國家安全的高度警覺。另一方面，真主黨的反擊行動也表明其不會輕易放棄對以色列的攻擊，這可能使得未來的衝突更加頻繁。參考報導指出，以色列的空襲是針對真主黨的具體目標，而Al Jazeera的報導則強調以色列在美國與伊朗達成協議後仍持續攻擊，顯示出各方對局勢的不同解讀。

supporting_titles: Fighting flares in Lebanon: 18 die in strikes, Israel says soldiers killed
Israel continues attacks on Lebanon despite US-Iran deal
supporting_summaries: Lebanon said 18 people were killed on Friday in Israeli air strikes in the south, while Israel’s military reported its first soldiers killed there since the sealing of a US-Iran deal to halt the Middle East war, including in Lebanon. Israel had said it was striking Hezbollah targets overnight and into the morning, while the Iran-backed militant group said it was attacking Israeli forces around the southern town of Nabatieh. “The intensive Israeli air strikes carried out from midnight until this...
Israel continues attacks on Lebanon despite US-Iran deal

politics.title: Trump's $300B Iran investment fund may be 'close to impossible' due to IRGC sanctions law, expert warns
politics.summary: Trump's $300B Iran investment fund faces legal roadblocks as expert warns IRGC-controlled construction sector creates sanctions risks under existing law.

briefing.news_focus: Trump's $300B Iran investment fund faces legal roadblocks as expert warns IRGC-controlled construction sector creates sanctions risks under existing law.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 特朗普提出的3000億美元伊朗投資基金面臨法律障礙，專家警告由於伊朗革命衛隊（IRGC）控制的建設部門，根據現行法律，該基金可能存在制裁風險，實現的可能性接近不可能。
briefing.background: 特朗普政府在其任期內對伊朗實施了一系列嚴厲的經濟制裁，特別是針對伊朗革命衛隊的制裁，旨在削弱其影響力及資金來源。這些制裁對於任何與伊朗有經濟往來的外國企業或投資者來說，均構成了重大風險。伊朗的建設行業由IRGC主導，這使得任何與該行業的合作都可能違反美國的制裁法規，進一步增加了投資的法律複雜性。
briefing.analysis: 特朗普的投資計劃面臨的法律挑戰反映了美國對伊朗政策的複雜性。專家指出，IRGC的控制使得任何與其相關的投資都可能成為制裁的目標，這對於希望進入伊朗市場的投資者來說，無疑是一個重大障礙。這也顯示出特朗普在推動經濟合作的同時，必須考量現行法律的限制。此外，這一情況可能會引發對特朗普政策的質疑，特別是在其未來的政治計劃中，如何平衡經濟利益與法律風險將成為關鍵議題。

economy.title: Oil prices rise as Lebanon fighting erupts and Hormuz traffic still slow
economy.summary: Brent crude reverses slide after oil, LNG tankers cross critical waterway.

briefing.news_focus: Brent crude reverses slide after oil, LNG tankers cross critical waterway.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 隨著黎巴嫩爆發衝突，布倫特原油價格回升，結束了之前的下滑趨勢。這一波價格上漲發生在石油和液化天然氣油輪穿越霍爾木茲海峽的背景下，該水道是全球最重要的石油運輸通道之一。
briefing.background: 霍爾木茲海峽是全球石油貿易的關鍵通道，約有五分之一的全球石油供應經過此地。近期黎巴嫩的衝突加劇了市場對地緣政治風險的擔憂，進而影響油價走勢。根據《經濟學人》的報導，儘管市場面臨波動，但原油價格在未來幾個月內不太可能回到之前的低點，這表明市場對供應鏈穩定性的擔憂仍然存在。
briefing.analysis: 黎巴嫩的衝突引發了對中東地區穩定性的擔憂，這直接影響了油價的上漲。根據《經濟學人》的分析，無論是達成協議還是無協議，油價在未來幾個月內都將保持波動，顯示出市場對供應和需求的高度敏感。這一點與主新聞的焦點相呼應，表明市場對霍爾木茲海峽的交通狀況持續關注，因為這將直接影響全球油價的波動。各方可能會因為地緣政治的變化而重新評估其能源政策，進一步影響市場動態。

supporting_titles: Deal or no deal, oil prices will stay volatile for months
supporting_summaries: The pre-war days of $60 crude are not coming back soon

economy.title: Another FTSE 100 firm falls to private equity. Where are the new listings? | Nils Pratley
economy.summary: You can’t complain Intertek’s £10bn takeover happened – the problem is the lack of arrivals in the other direction It would be a stretch to describe the £10bn-ish takeover of Intertek as a landmark event for the London stock market or the FTSE 100 index. This is not an Arm Holdings moment – the purchase of that Cambridge chip designer by Japan’s SoftBank in 2016 provoked long (and continuing) agonising over the lack of whizzy tech stocks on the London market. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: You can’t complain Intertek’s £10bn takeover happened – the problem is the lack of arrivals in the other direction It would be a stretch to describe the £10bn-ish takeover of Intertek as a landmark event for the London stock market or the FTSE 100 index. This is not an Arm Holdings moment – the purchase of that Cambridge chip designer by Japan’s SoftBank in 2016 provoked long (and continuing) agonising over the lack of whizzy tech stocks on the London market. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: Intertek以約100億英鎊被私募股權公司收購，這一事件並未被視為倫敦股市或FTSE 100指數的重大里程碑。與2016年日本軟銀收購Arm Holdings相比，此次收購未能引發對倫敦市場缺乏創新科技股的持續關注。
briefing.background: 倫敦股市近年來面臨私募股權收購增多的趨勢，這使得新上市公司的數量減少。Intertek的收購反映了私募股權對成熟企業的興趣，尤其是在經濟不確定性增加的背景下。投資者對於科技股的需求持續上升，但倫敦市場的科技創新卻未能跟上，這引發了對市場活力的擔憂。這一情況與其他國際市場形成鮮明對比，特別是美國市場在科技股方面的表現。
briefing.analysis: Intertek的收購顯示出私募股權公司在當前經濟環境中的活躍程度，這一趨勢可能會繼續影響倫敦市場的結構。市場分析師指出，缺乏新上市公司的情況可能會導致投資者對倫敦股市的興趣減少，進一步影響資本流入。相較於2016年Arm Holdings的收購，Intertek的交易未能引發類似的市場熱情，顯示出倫敦市場在吸引創新型企業方面的挑戰。未來，若無法吸引更多科技公司上市，倫敦股市可能會面臨更大的競爭壓力，特別是來自美國和亞洲市場的挑戰。

economy.title: Chinese EV brands signal Southeast Asia expansion at Hong Kong auto expo
economy.summary: China’s electric vehicle makers are using Hong Kong’s annual auto expo this week to signal their ambitions in the Southeast Asian market, with some brands rolling out right-hand drive models for the region’s roads. “Our first priority will be Indonesia,” Amy Gong, president of Seres Group subsidiary DSFK, said on the sidelines of the International Automobile and Supply Chain Expo on Thursday. “Expanding manufacturing capacity in the Southeast Asian market depends mainly on demand.” Built in...

briefing.news_focus: China’s electric vehicle makers are using Hong Kong’s annual auto expo this week to signal their ambitions in the Southeast Asian market, with some brands rolling out right-hand drive models for the region’s roads. “Our first priority will be Indonesia,” Amy Gong, president of Seres Group subsidiary DSFK, said on the sidelines of the International Automobile and Supply Chain Expo on Thursday. “Expanding manufacturing capacity in the Southeast Asian market depends mainly on demand.” Built in...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國電動車製造商在香港年度汽車博覽會上展示了其在東南亞市場的擴張計劃，部分品牌推出了適合當地道路的右駕車型。Seres Group子公司DSFK的總裁Amy Gong表示，該公司首要目標是印尼，並指出在東南亞市場的擴張將主要取決於需求。
briefing.background: 香港作為國際汽車展的舉辦地，吸引了眾多中國電動車品牌參展，顯示出這些品牌對於東南亞市場的重視。隨著全球對電動車需求的增加，中國電動車製造商正積極尋找新的市場機會。東南亞地區擁有潛在的消費者基礎，尤其是在印尼，這是一個快速增長的汽車市場。香港的展會不僅是展示新車型的平台，也是中國品牌進一步擴展國際市場的重要契機。
briefing.analysis: 中國電動車品牌在香港汽車博覽會上的亮相，顯示出其對東南亞市場的強烈興趣，尤其是印尼的潛力。這些品牌的擴張計劃可能會受到當地需求和市場競爭的影響。參考報導提到香港正在吸引更多交易，這可能為中國品牌提供了更多的商業機會。然而，香港的政治環境和政策變化也可能影響這些品牌的擴張策略。各方利益關係中，中國電動車製造商希望通過進入新市場來增長銷售，而東南亞國家則可能面臨如何平衡外資進入與本地產業保護的挑戰。

supporting_titles: Hong Kong is getting its financial mojo back
supporting_summaries: The hub is attracting more deals. And more Beijing-style politics
